title: AVERT Execution Request
description: A request to perform the AVERT Execute step against a government system. In the Apier reference implementation, write actions are gated and currently run as a design-partner preview through a mock submitter (see IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md). Set `dry_run` to true to run the Validate step without performing the government call.

action.description: The government action to perform. `mva_melding`: Norwegian VAT return. `a_melding`: Norwegian employer report.

organisation_number.description: Identifier of the entity the action is performed for.

entity.description: The entity on whose behalf the action runs.

period.description: The reporting period the action covers, such as a VAT term or a calendar month.

payload.description: Action-specific submission payload. Intentionally open: the shape of this object is checked by the Validate step, not by this transport schema.

dry_run.description: When true, the implementation runs the Validate step and returns its outcome without performing the government call.

idempotency_key.description: Caller-supplied key that makes a write action safe to retry: a duplicate key returns the stored result of the first call rather than submitting again.
